briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines rather than actual artificial intelligence.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the collapse of fintech middleware company Synapse, raising serious questions about consumer protections in embedded banking.

- **[Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment](https://www.lesnumeriques.com/banque-en-ligne/adieu-visa-et-mastercard-130-millions-d-europeens-basculent-vers-un-paiement-100-souverain-des-2026-n250918.html)** — *Hacker News* — Over 130 million Europeans are transitioning to a sovereign, domestically controlled payment network, signalling a major shift away from US-dominated card rails.

- **[Financial losses from scams hit £1.3bn a year as criminals turn to AI](https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwykp9ygxlvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss)** — *BBC Business* — UK fraud losses have reached £1.3 billion annually as criminals increasingly leverage AI tools to execute scams at scale, with nearly eight cases of money theft reported every minute.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping competitive dynamics in the payments industry and what that means for consumers and incumbents alike.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Nuvei to buy US payments processor Payoneer for $2.75 billion USD](https://betakit.com/nuvei-to-buy-us-payments-processor-payoneer-for-2-75-billion-usd/)** — *BetaKit* — Montreal-based payments giant Nuvei announced a $2.75 billion USD acquisition of global payments platform Payoneer, significantly expanding its cross-border payments capabilities.

- **[1Password acquires Apono to become the "control plane" for businesses using agentic AI](https://betakit.com/1password-acquires-apono-to-become-the-control-pane-for-businesses-using-agentic-ai/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian security firm 1Password acquired access management startup Apono, positioning itself as the central security layer for enterprises deploying agentic AI systems.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada's federal government flagged screen scraping as a security risk and committed to an open banking framework, a milestone that continues to shape Canada's consumer-directed finance journey. *(Note: foundational context for Canada's ongoing open banking implementation.)*

- **[Legacy Keeper launches to organize estate planning with AI agents](https://betakit.com/legacy-keeper-launches-to-organize-estate-planning-with-ai-agents/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian startup Legacy Keeper has launched an AI agent-powered platform to help individuals and families organize estate planning documents and processes.

- **[US foreign access ban on Anthropic models puts control over AI in the spotlight](https://betakit.com/us-foreign-access-ban-on-anthropic-models-puts-control-over-ai-in-the-spotlight/)** — *BetaKit* — A US directive restricting foreign access to Anthropic's latest AI models is raising urgent questions in Canada about AI sovereignty and dependency on American technology infrastructure.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is driving unconventional credit card products with novel rewards and underwriting models, relevant to Atlantic Canadian credit unions and fintechs exploring alternative consumer lending products.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple's acquisition of open banking credit intelligence firm Credit Kudos signals Big Tech's growing interest in financial data, with implications for Canada's own open banking regulatory trajectory and Atlantic fintech startups building in the credit and lending space.
